summary: Iteration 14 - Full testing of Hero Cursus + Admin Cursus + Hover Effects features. All 9 required features verified working. Backend: 19/19 tests passing. Frontend: all features confirmed via Playwright.

minor.issue: Cannot clear hero_title/hero_description by setting to null: `update = {k: v for k, v in body.model_dump().items() if v is not None}` filters out None values. Minor: can't erase hero text once set via API.

action_items: Minor: Fix CursusUpdate endpoint to allow clearing hero_title/hero_description (set to null). Change filter from `if v is not None` to allow explicit null values for these optional fields.
Minor: The PUT /admin/cursus/{id} endpoint also has the same issue for other optional fields, but hero_title/hero_description are the most likely to need clearing.
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/admin/cursus/{id}: `update = {k: v for k, v in body.model_dump().items() if v is not None}` - Cannot reset hero_title/hero_description to null once set. Should use `body.model_dump(exclude_unset=True)` or handle explicit None clearing separately.

The admin /admin route (React app) redirects to /profil for admin users - this is expected since there's no dedicated /admin landing page in the React app. Admin features are accessed via /admin/cursus, /admin/courses etc. directly.
seed_data_creation: No seed data created. cursus-falsafa already featured with hero_title set in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 9 features from iteration 14 pass. Key verified items: (1) Login testuser@hikma.com works; (2) Homepage hero shows cursus-falsafa with hero_title 'La Falsafa — Philosophie de l'Islam classique'; (3) Eyebrow shows 'À la une · Cursus A'; (4) Hover on episode cards: bg #1A1A1A→#222222, border-bottom 2px colored (cursus color green); (5) COMMENCER navigates to /cursus tab; (6) /admin/cursus shows star icons, gold star (★) for featured cursus; (7) /admin/courses shows star-outline for all courses (no course featured, cursus is); (8) /admin/course-form has 'Texte À la une' section with titre/description héro fields; (9) Homepage has 5 sections: hero, 5 episode cards, 4 rec cards, 5 top5 rows, bottom nav. Backend 19 tests all pass.

passing_verifications.feature1_login: PASS: testuser@hikma.com / TestUser123! logs in, redirects to homepage
passing_verifications.feature2_hero_cursus_title: PASS: Hero title = 'La Falsafa — Philosophie de l'Islam classique' (hero_title from cursus)
passing_verifications.feature2_hero_cursus_description: PASS: Hero description shows 'D'Al-Kindī à Averroès...' (hero_description from cursus)
passing_verifications.feature3_hero_label: PASS: Eyebrow text = 'À la une · Cursus A' (cursus_letter, not full name)
passing_verifications.feature4_hover_bg: PASS: Hover changes episode card bg from rgb(26,26,26)=#1A1A1A to rgb(34,34,34)=#222222
passing_verifications.feature4_hover_border: PASS: Hover shows borderBottomWidth=2px with cursus color (rgb(4,209,130)=#04D182)
passing_verifications.feature4_hover_revert: PASS: Background reverts to #1A1A1A when mouse leaves
passing_verifications.feature5_commencer_btn: PASS: COMMENCER button navigates to /cursus (not /course) when cursus is featured
passing_verifications.feature6_admin_cursus: PASS: /admin/cursus shows 5 cursus with star icons, gold star for cursus-falsafa (is_featured=True)
passing_verifications.feature7_admin_courses_star: PASS: /admin/courses shows star-outline for all 24 courses (correct: cursus featured, not course)
passing_verifications.feature8_course_form_hero: PASS: /admin/course-form has 'Texte À la une' section with titre héro + description héro fields
passing_verifications.feature9_regression_sections: PASS: Homepage 5 sections: hero (testid home-hero-title), 5 episode cards, 4 rec cards, 5 top5 rows, bottom nav (Accueil/Cursus/Épisodes/Profs/Biblio)
